headline: Is Domino’s Pizza, Inc. (DPZ) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is DPZ a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Domino’s Pizza, Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by Company-Charts. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on DPZ. Domino’s Pizza, Inc.’s share was trading at $317.69 as of June 9th. DPZ’s trailing and forward P/E were 18.29 and 16.47 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Cracker Barrel: One Good Quarter Doesn't Take This Company Out Of The Woods
summary: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store, Inc.'s Q3 earnings sparked a 20% rally and higher profit outlook. Click for this earnings update of CBRL stock.
